basics.name: Anish Shobith P S
basics.label: Software Engineer
basics.summary: Software engineer and open source developer building full-stack web applications and developer tools with TypeScript, React, Next.js, and Node.js.

work.name: Independent
highlights: Build and maintain open source developer tools in TypeScript and Node.js, from a CLI to a small programming language and web apps, with automated Docker and CI builds
Mentor students, judge hackathons, and speak at various colleges

work.name: Zenduty (Xurrent)
highlights: Built internal tools that centralized operational data into one interface, replacing manual lookups for the team
Migrated legacy front-end to a shadcn/ui component system, standardizing UI patterns across the product
Fixed a broad backlog of production bugs, improving internal workflow efficiency an estimated 10-20%

projects.name: Spire
projects.description: Real-time code sharing that streams local file changes over the web through a REST and Server-Sent Events API, with no setup required.

projects.name: anishshobithps.com
projects.description: Full-stack personal platform with an MDX blog, authenticated guestbook, and live Spotify, on Neon Postgres and Drizzle.

projects.name: The Mandala Studio
projects.description: Interactive generator rendering infinite mandala patterns as SVG, with OKLCH color editing and URL-based config persistence.
